subject: Drizzile, a bipedal lizard-like creature, standing on a coastal rocky ledge with ocean in the background
description: A slim, upright blue-green lizard-like creature stands on a rocky shoreline, its long tail curling behind it. The background shows a bright coastal scene with blue water and distant cliffs or hills visible under a clear sky. The creature has a distinctly languid, almost nonchalant posture, facing slightly to the left. The art has a lively outdoor feel with warm light on the rocks.
foreground: bipedal lizard creature on rocky ground
background: coastal cliffs, blue ocean water, clear sky
